title: Carousel
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Carousel with local selected-index state, keyboard navigation, controls, examples, and parity fixtures without Embla runtime dependencies.

registry.reason: Carousel previous and next controls compose the local shadcn Button registry item.
Carousel examples compose the local shadcn Card registry item.
shadcn Carousel uses local class canonicalization and Tailwind conflict handling.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, keyboard event, and Command types for the Foldkit-native Carousel helper.
Provides Effect Schema literals, Match, Array, and Option utilities for Carousel state and messages.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin Embla behavior is replaced by local Foldkit selected-index state in installable output.
Autoplay/plugin parity needs a broader lifecycle-command foundation and is deferred instead of using timers in view code.
Origin icon controls are represented by local inline SVGs in this batch.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local Arabic example constants and origin fixture aliases.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: CarouselDemo
examples.description: Basic Card Carousel with five square slides and previous/next controls.

examples.title: CarouselSize
examples.description: Carousel item sizing example with half-width and third-width responsive slides.

examples.title: CarouselMultiple
examples.description: Carousel showing multiple responsive items with breakpoint-gated controls.

examples.title: CarouselSpacing
examples.description: Carousel custom spacing example using tighter content and item offsets.

examples.title: CarouselOrientation
examples.description: Vertical Carousel orientation with vertical controls and keyboard handling.

examples.title: CarouselApi
examples.description: Carousel status example rendered from local state as Slide 1 of 5.

examples.title: CarouselRtl
examples.description: RTL Carousel using local Arabic numerals instead of the origin language selector.

deviations.summary: Carousel uses local Foldkit selected-index state instead of Embla's runtime API.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot require embla-carousel-react. Local Model and Message helpers preserve selected index, orientation, boundary state, controls, and keyboard navigation within the Foldkit architecture.

deviations.summary: Previous and next controls use local inline SVGs instead of lucide-react.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. Local SVGs preserve the icon DOM role, visual footprint, and RTL rotation classes.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local Arabic numeral formatting instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic example constants preserve the default RTL rendered output while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.
The origin plugin example depends on embla-carousel-autoplay. Representing autoplay idiomatically needs a broader lifecycle-command foundation, so this batch intentionally avoids timers in view code.
